2606.12402.title: DIRECT: When and Where Should You Allocate Test-Time Compute in Embodied Planners?
2606.12402.paper_summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as high-level planners for embodied agents, with an emerging strategy of scaling test-time compute to improve capability. However, we observe that doing so increases latency, token usage, and FLOPs while yielding uneven, often diminishing gains in downstream success, limiting where embodied agents can be deployed. We argue that choosing when and where to spend test-time compute is central to bringing frontier performance to the real world. We introduce DIRECT, a routing framework that uses multimodal scene context to allocate compute per prompt, improving the success--cost Pareto frontier over fixed model selection. Across three dominant scaling axes, namely chain-of-thought depth, model size, and memory history, our experiments on VLABench and RoboMME show that test-time compute is not a uniform lever: different axes yield qualitatively distinct capability gains. We validate these insights on a physical Franka arm in a DROID setup spanning zero-shot manipulation and long-horizon chaining, where our router matches or exceeds a stronger model's success rate at up to 65% lower average latency. Ultimately, our results show that naively scaling test-time compute is wasteful, and that DIRECT can provide frontier-level embodied planning in robotic systems at a fraction of the cost. Project page can be found at jadee-dao.github.io/direct/.
2606.12402.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型（VLMs）越來越多地被用作具身代理的高階規劃者，並出現了一種通過擴大測試時間計算來提升能力的策略。<lb/>然而，我們觀察到這樣做會增加延遲、令牌使用量和浮點運算次數（FLOPs），同時在下游成功方面產生不均勻且往往減少的收益，限制了具身代理的部署範圍。<lb/>我們認為，選擇何時何地投入測試時間計算對於將前沿性能帶入現實世界至關重要。<lb/>我們介紹了DIRECT，一種路由框架，利用多模態場景上下文來為每個提示分配計算，改善了固定模型選擇下的成功-成本帕累托邊界。<lb/>在三個主要的擴展軸上，即思考鏈深度、模型大小和記憶歷史，我們在VLABench和RoboMME上的實驗顯示，測試時間計算並不是一個統一的杠杆：不同的軸會產生質量上不同的能力增益。<lb/>我們在DROID設置中的物理Franka手臂上驗證了這些見解，涵蓋了零-shot操作和長期鏈接，我們的路由器在平均延遲降低高達65%的情況下，成功率與更強模型相當或更高。<lb/>最終，我們的結果顯示，盲目擴大測試時間計算是浪費的，而DIRECT可以以極低的成本在機器人系統中提供前沿級的具身規劃。<lb/>項目頁面可以在jadee-dao.github.io/direct/找到。
2606.12402.author: Jadelynn Dao et.al.
2606.12402.authors: Jadelynn Dao, Milan Ganai, Yasmina Abukhadra, Ajay Sridhar, Mozhgan Nasr Azadani, Katie Luo, Clark Barrett, Jiajun Wu, Chelsea Finn, Marco Pavone
